description: Begging letter to a cantor together with the refusal in reply, mentioning Abū l-Faḍāʾil. (Information from CUDL.) (This is not quite clear; it appears that everything here was written by the same scribe, albeit with different pens. The request has to do with prayers rather than money, or at least it is not overtly about money. Needs further examination.)
description_he: מכתב בקשה לחזן יחד עם הסירוב בתשובה, המזכיר אבו אל-פדאאיל. (מידע מתוך CUDL.) הבקשה נוגעת לתפילות ולא בבירור לכסף. נדרשת בדיקה נוספת.
